full_text:
Cao Shuo 曹鑠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Shuo (曹鑠). Served Wei. The Prince of Xiangshang. Died at a young age. Cao Shuo was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
